detectors.description:
Legolas.claimBonus(address,uint256) (Legolas.sol#633-671) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- bonusByLgo = (BONUS_AMOUNT / 4) / unspentAmounts[_bonusDate] (Legolas.sol#651)
	- holderBonus = initialAllocations[_address] * bonusByLgo (Legolas.sol#657)
detectors.markdown:
[Legolas.claimBonus(address,uint256)](Legolas.sol#L633-L671) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [bonusByLgo = (BONUS_AMOUNT / 4) / unspentAmounts[_bonusDate]](Legolas.sol#L651)
	- [holderBonus = initialAllocations[_address] * bonusByLgo](Legolas.sol#L657)

detectors.description:

detectors.description:
LegolasBase.updateBonusEligibity(address) (Legolas.sol#255-277) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- now < BONUS_DATES[3] && initialAllocations[_from] > 0 && balances[_from] < allocations[_from] (Legolas.sol#257-261)
	- now < BONUS_DATES[i] && eligibleForBonus[BONUS_DATES[i]][_from] (Legolas.sol#265)
detectors.markdown:
[LegolasBase.updateBonusEligibity(address)](Legolas.sol#L255-L277) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- [now < BONUS_DATES[3] && initialAllocations[_from] > 0 && balances[_from] < allocations[_from]](Legolas.sol#L257-L261)
	- [now < BONUS_DATES[i] && eligibleForBonus[BONUS_DATES[i]][_from]](Legolas.sol#L265)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.13 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder
	- ZeroFunctionSelector
	- DelegateCallReturnValue
	- ECRecoverMalformedInput.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.13 (Legolas.sol#1)
